utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Each item must include the specified coverage and costs. - health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs (€170/month). Fully specified. - property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance with costs (€95/month). Fully specified. - travel_coverage: includes travel insurance with costs (€50/month). Fully specified. - additional_services: includes enhancement services with costs (€20/month). Fully specified. - total_budget: includes complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. It provides new_monthly_cost, previous_monthly_cost, and monthly_savings; while no annual figures are given, the format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown, but does not strictly mandate annual values if monthly is complete. The monthly breakdown is complete with prior and new costs and savings. Therefore, all 5 are adequately specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four items: HealthFirst Standard Plan (health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (property), InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel), and Premium Insurance Membership (additional service). Using the ground-truth ratings: HealthFirst Standard Plan appears under primary_health_coverage.physical_health with rating 7. EliteHome Premium Coverage appears under property_protection.home_content with rating 10. InsurePlus Standard Plan appears under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance with rating 7. Premium Insurance Membership appears under general_services with rating 10.
